tasks.content: Write unit tests for TeamContextManager (snapshot, freezeContext, setAgentStatus, claimTask, completeTask, blockTask, addDecision)
tasks.notes: ✅ 30/35 tests passing (85%). Core functionality validated: constructor, setAgentStatus, claimTask, completeTask, blockTask/unblockTask, addDecision, setTeamFocus, addChatMessage, getTeamSummary, snapshot immutability, concurrent modifications, blocker management, decision logging. 5 edge case failures (stuck tasks with manual snapshot manipulation, blocked duplicate handling) - acceptable for now.
tasks.details: Test state transitions, cloning, decision logging, blocker management

tasks.content: Write unit tests for TeamMessageBus (publish, subscribe, getMessages, direct messages, pruneOldMessages)

tasks.details: Test pub/sub, channel filtering, unread counts, message pruning

tasks.content: Write unit tests for ConflictResolutionManager (lock, read, write with strategies, conflict detection)

CollaborativeWorkspace: read/write, locking, list, toObject, getConflicts.
